summary: Completed testing of Credit Liability Tracking feature for Admin Dashboard. All backend API tests passed (16/16) and frontend displays all required data correctly. The /api/admin/wallet/liability endpoint returns correct data structure with credit_liability, tutor_payout_exposure, platform_commission, wallet_summary, and historical_usage sections. Frontend Credit Liability Tracker section shows: Paid Credits Outstanding (8), Bonus Credits Outstanding (1), Tutor Payout Exposure (RM108), Total Top-up Revenue (RM200), Platform Commission (RM27), Sessions Completed (0), Tutor Payouts Made (RM0).
seed_data_creation: Used existing wallet data from previous testing. 3 wallets exist with 8 paid credits and 1 bonus credit outstanding.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Credit Liability Tracking feature fully tested and working. Key findings: 1) API endpoint /api/admin/wallet/liability returns all required fields correctly, 2) Calculations are accurate: credit_price=RM15, tutor_rate=80%, commission_rate=20%, 3) Frontend displays all 4 main cards (Paid Credits Outstanding, Bonus Credits Outstanding, Tutor Payout Exposure, Total Top-up Revenue) and 3 additional stats (Platform Commission, Sessions Completed, Tutor Payouts Made), 4) Data values match between API response and frontend display, 5) Refresh button available for manual data refresh.
